# WP4 fixture: banish weak avoided Echoes below freeze threshold
# Scenario: no acceptable pick and no freeze candidate -> banish the worst
# eligible avoided slot; guaranteed build-slot card is skipped.

@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 canBanish=1 pickIsAcceptable=0
1:801:10:guaranteed:avoided
2:802:5:avoided:banish

@expect action=banish target=2 boardState=OPEN

# All slots below threshold: banish lowest-score eligible slot
@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 canBanish=1 pickIsAcceptable=0
1:811:15:avoided:banish
2:812:8:avoided:banish
3:813:25:avoided

@expect action=banish target=2 boardState=OPEN

# Sub-threshold board with no banish-eligible slots -> select best legal fallback
@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=0 canBanish=1 pickIsAcceptable=0
1:821:15
2:822:8

@expect action=SELECT target=1 boardState=OPEN
